title: ranunculus caroli-frederici
intro: Ranunculus caroli-frederici, also known as the Charles-Frederick buttercup, is a species of flowering plant in the family Ranunculaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Ranunculus caroli-frederici include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in tinctures and infusions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
